# Feature Request

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Use Case

What workflow would this improve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the shape of the solution if you have one.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or workarounds.

## Privacy Check

- [ ] This request uses generic examples only.
- [ ] This request does not include private operating documents, customer data,
      credentials, or personal chat transcripts.
